rationale.R1.5: The agent output does not provide a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but rather a list of covered dimensions with scores.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output presents all results as equally confident without disclosing uncertainty or confidence intervals for the reported F1 scores and deltas.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output mostly adheres to the scope of evaluating the proposed method on the HDFS, BGL, and Thunderbird benchmarks, but lacks clarity on some aspects such as model identity and one-class SVM setup.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output does not introduce new errors or harmful content, but rather presents a critique with targeted revisions for the section.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output blends sources without providing clear traceability or annotations for non-cosmetic changes.
